ICKACS- 2K26

ABOUT THE COLLEGE

COIMBATORE, the fast growing industrial hub of Kongunadu had the need for more colleges during the 70s, and this demand was fulfilled on 12th August 1973, the day on which Kongunadu Arts and Science College came into existence.

16th October 1972 is a memorable day in the history of our College. On that day, the Thudiyalur Cooperative Agricultural Services Limited organized a function to celebrate Saraswathi Pooja. (Late) Thiru. V.K. Lakshmanan, M.Sc., (Ex-MLA), a progressive agriculturist and public worker noted for his selfless service and devotion to work and Dr. M. Aruchami, M.Sc., B.T., Ph.D., FAZ., FRES (Lond), the present President of our College Council and Committee participated in the function. During the function, both of them expressed their long cherished desire to start a College which was immediately welcomed (Dip) USA, the then President of the Thudiyalur Cooperative Agricultural Service.

ABOUT THE DEPARTMENT

The Department of Computer Science was established in the year 1988 with the objective of imparting quality education in the field of Computer Science and strives to shape outstanding computer professionals. The Department has modern facilities for teaching, learning and research. The Department offers a wide range of research opportunities and programs of study at undergraduate and postgraduate level. The training imparted aims to prepare young minds for the challenging opportunities in the IT industry with a global awareness supported by experts in the field of Computer Science.

M.Sc Computer Science programme was started in the year 2012 with the aim to develop core competence in Computer Science and prepare the students to carry out development work, as well as take up challenges in research. Besides these, as an added feather, the Department has evolved as Research Department by offering Master of Philosophy (M.Phil.) and Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) in Computer Science with the aim of producing quality researchers and high-impact interdisciplinary research.

ABOUT THE CONFERENCE

The International Conference on Knowledge Acquisition in Computer Science: Techniques, Challenges, and Emerging Trends (ICKACS-2026) is a premier international forum dedicated to bringing together researchers, academicians, industry professionals, innovators, and students to exchange ideas, present cutting-edge research, and discuss the latest advancements in the field of Computer Science and Knowledge Acquisition.

Knowledge acquisition plays a vital role in modern intelligent systems by enabling computers to collect, organize, represent, and utilize knowledge effectively. With the rapid growth of Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine Learning (ML), Data Science, Big Data Analytics, Internet of Things (IoT), Cloud Computing, Cybersecurity, Blockchain, and Generative AI, the need for efficient knowledge acquisition techniques has become increasingly significant.

IMPORTANT DATES

  • Full Paper Submission 6th August 2026
  • Notification of Acceptance 12th August 2026
  • Last Date for Registration (On or before) 21st August 2026

REGISTRATION FEE

  • Patron / Academician
    ₹500
  • Author / Research Scholar
    ₹400
  • Student
    ₹300

GUIDELINES

  • No DA/TA will be provided.
  • Papers must be prepared in IEEE Format.
  • Maximum paper length: 7 pages.
  • Selected papers will be published in Scopus-indexed International Journal.
  • Hard copy of the proceedings is available on request at an additional cost of ₹200.

CONFERENCE TRACKS / TOPICS

Artificial Intelligence (AI)

Intelligent systems and techniques enabling machines to think and learn.

Information Security

Intelligent systems, integrity and availability of information.

Neural Networks

Computing systems inspired by the human brain and nervous systems.

Machine Learning (ML)

Algorithms that enable systems to learn from data and improve.

Mobile Ad Hoc Networks (MANET)

Self-configuring networks for mobile devices without fixed infrastructure.

E-Learning

Digital learning technologies and online education systems.

Generative AI

AI models that generate content, ideas, and solutions.

Natural Language Processing (NLP)

Enabling computers to understand, interpret and generate human language.

E-Commerce

Electronic transactions and online business models.

Biometrics

Technologies for human identification using biological traits.

Open Source Technology

Leveraging open-source tools and platforms for innovation.

Blockchain Technology

Decentralized and secure digital transaction systems.

Cloud Computing

On-demand computing resources delivered over the internet.

Pattern Computing

Methods for pattern recognition, classification and analysis.

Big Data

Managing and analyzing large, complex datasets.

Digital Image Processing

Techniques for analyzing, enhancing and interpreting digital images.

Quantum Computing

Harnessing quantum mechanics for powerful computation.

Virtual Reality (VR)

Immersive 3D environments for simulation and interaction.

Grid Computing

Distributed computing for solving large-scale problems.

Remote Sensing

Processing data above the Earth using sensors on satellites or aircraft.

Internet of Things (IoT)

Connecting devices and enabling smart, intelligent systems.

Network Security

Protecting networks and data from unauthorized access and attacks.

Real-Time Analysis

Processing and analyzing data as it is generated.

PAPER SUBMISSION GUIDELINES

  • Papers must be original, unpublished and not submitted elsewhere.
  • Use IEEE Template for manuscript preparation.
  • Maximum paper length: 7 pages (including figures, tables and references).
  • All submissions will go through a double-blind peer review process.
  • Accepted papers will be presented in the conference and published in Scopus-indexed International Journal.

PUBLICATION & PROCEEDINGS

  • Selected and presented papers will be published in a Scopus-indexed International Journal.
  • E-Proceedings will be provided to all registered participants.
  • Hard copy of the proceedings is available on request at an additional cost of ₹300.

PAYMENT QR

Payment: Scan the QR Code to pay
